properties.comment: Lineage with semantics query optimization - CQs and UCQs
properties.entry: Q(X) :- R(x,y). ANS: Q. LINEAGE FOR R.
Q(X) :- R(x,y). ANS: Q. QT(1). LINEAGE FOR R FOR RESULTS FROM QT.
Q(X) :- PK_R(x,y), PK_S(y,z). ANS: Q. LINEAGE FOR PK_R.
Q(X) :- PK_R(x,y), PK_S(y,z). QT(2). ANS: Q. LINEAGE FOR PK_R FOR RESULTS FROM QT.
Q(X) :- PK_R(x,y), PK_R(y,z). QT(2). ANS: Q. LINEAGE FOR PK_R FOR RESULTS FROM QT.
Q(X) :- PK_R(x,y), PK_T(y,z). QT(2). ANS: Q. LINEAGE FOR PK_R FOR RESULTS FROM QT.
Q(X,X) :- PK_R(X,Y), X=2. ANS : Q. LINEAGE FOR PK_R.
Q(X) :- PK_R(X,Y), X < 10. Q(X) :- PK_R(X,Y), Y > 10. ANS : Q. LINEAGE FOR PK_R.
